Name: Author
Description: The person who created the demographics file. Files generated by |COMPS_s| will include this value, but it is not used by |EMOD_s| simulations.

Name: DateCreated
Description: The date the demographics file was created. Files generated by |COMPS_s| will include this value, but it is not used by |EMOD_s| simulations.

Name: IdReference
Description: The identifier for a simulation; all input files (except configuration and campaign files) used in a simulation must have the same **IdReference** value. The value must be greater than 0. If the input files are generated using |COMPS_s|, this indicates the method used for generating the **NodeID**, the identifier used for each node in the simulation.

Name: Metadata
Description: The structure that contains the metadata for the demographics file.

Name: NodeCount
Description: The number of nodes to expect in the input files. This parameter is required.

Name: Resolution
Description: The spatial resolution of the demographics file. Files generated by |COMPS_s| will include this value, but it is not used by |EMOD_s| simulations.

Name: Tool
Description: The software tool used to create the demographics file. Files generated by |COMPS_s| will include this value, but it is not used by |EMOD_s| simulations.
